programme.title: September Breezes
programme.desc: Roula returns to her home in a rural Syrian village, where her grandmother, Umm Fawaz, still lives. Unexpected events force her to stay longer than she thought, and her life converges with youth and the elderly in her village. Sabah Jazairi, Nadeen Tahseen baik.

programme.title: Al Maddah: The Legend Of The End
programme.desc: Facing Sameeh, the demon of the underworld, Saber Al Maddah fights his hardest battle yet, having given up his powers for love, leaving faith as his last hope to secure the victory of good. Hamada Helal, Ghada Adel.

programme.title: Abdel Ghani's Daughters
programme.desc: Three sisters team up to stop their older sister's forced wedding, but each of their plans fails, exposing family conflicts and the social pressures tied to marriage within the household. Abdullah Al Turkmany, Maram Al Bloushi.

programme.title: A.B.I.
programme.desc: Dogan leaves his family's dark and troubled past behind and runs away to start a new life with a new identity, but the past refuses to leave him alone and forces him to return once again when some secrets come to light. Kenan Imirzalioglu, Afra Saracoglu.

programme.title: One More Chance
programme.desc: Three teenage friends from a poor neighborhood transfer to an elite private school on scholarships after the death of their close friend, who falls from the school's highest building. Determined to find his killer, they begin investigating the crime from within. Hulya Akdemir.

programme.title: Studio 23
programme.desc: A group of employees at a struggling TV channel work to prove their skills to an owner determined to keep the channel running despite all its challenges. Habeeb Al Habeeb, Abdulaziz Al Nassar.

programme.title: Plan B
programme.desc: When the theater group is exposed to fraud, its members unite with the intention of seeking retribution and foiling the deceitful schemes of unscrupulous businessmen. Ibrahim Al Hajaj, Mila Elzhrany, Ibrahim Al Hajjaj, Mila Al Zahrani.

programme.title: Drama Queen
programme.desc: Bothaina is torn between her hope of reuniting with her daughters and the painful reality of a marriage that is falling apart, until escalating conflicts and deep emotional strains force her to confront something she can no longer ignore. Sahar Husain, Abdullah Al Khuder.

programme.title: Wild Heart
programme.desc: Kidnapped from his wealthy family as a child, Yaman grows up on the streets, forming close bonds along the way. Years later, he's reunited with his biological family but struggles to adjust to a life of privilege he no longer remembers. Halit Özgür Sari, Yurdaer Okur, Dolunay Soysert, Bertan Asllani, Cagatay Tosun, Hilal Yildiz, Halit Ozgur Sari, Simay Barlas.

programme.title: Roses And Sins
programme.desc: Serhat, a self-made man who rose from nothing, watches his stability collapse when his wife slips into a coma and he discovers a dark secret about her. In his search for answers, he crosses paths with Zeynep, a florist pursuing the same truth. Murat Yildirim, Cemre Baysel.

programme.title: Underground
programme.desc: Imprisoned for vengeance and entangled in Turkeys' deadliest cartel, Haydar Ali's true war ignites upon his release, when he learns that the woman he has always loved got married to his closest ally. Devrim Ozkan, Deniz Can Aktas.

programme.title: The Traitor
programme.desc: After discovering her husband's affair with a woman fifteen years younger, Aseel's perfect world shatters. programme.title: Surrogate Mother
programme.desc: When the Iraqi family discovers that their daughter-in-law is not having children, they begin to consider hiring another woman as a surrogate mother. Hend Kamel, Adel Abbas, Zohour Alaa, Alexander Uloom, Joumanah Kareem, Nada Emad Khalil, David Oryan, Hind Kamel, Hind Kamil.

programme.title: My Family Wins
programme.desc: In each episode, Jawad Al Shakarchi hosts two families competing to answer a series of general knowledge questions to win the grand prize of ten million Iraqi dinars. Jawad Al Shakraji, Fadi Hadad, Haider Nashi, Jawad Al Shakarchi, Fadi Haddad, Jawad Al Shakarji.

programme.title: September Breezes
programme.desc: Roula returns to her home in a rural Syrian village, where her grandmother, Umm Fawaz, still lives. Unexpected events force her to stay longer than she thought, and her life converges with youth and the elderly in her village. Sabah Jazairi, Nadeen Tahseen baik.

programme.title: Al Maddah: The Legend Of The End
programme.desc: Facing Sameeh, the demon of the underworld, Saber Al Maddah fights his hardest battle yet, having given up his powers for love, leaving faith as his last hope to secure the victory of good. Hamada Helal, Ghada Adel.

programme.title: Wild Heart
programme.desc: Kidnapped from his wealthy family as a child, Yaman grows up on the streets, forming close bonds along the way. Halit Özgür Sari, Yurdaer Okur, Dolunay Soysert, Bertan Asllani, Cagatay Tosun, Hilal Yildiz, Halit Ozgur Sari, Simay Barlas.

programme.desc: Not only does coincidence bring together the mysterious businessman Aslan and psychotherapist Devin, but they also share the same psychological traumas caused by their families. programme.desc: S1 E27 تحذر إش إش رجب من عبد العاطي واسماعيل. فيما يغفو الجميع، يقع شجار كبير بين مختار ولبنى بسبب إش إش.\r.
programme.title: إش إش موس

programme.desc: S1 E28 تضع شادية نفسها في موقف محرج أمام إش إش. تزور لبنى إخلاص ومعها \"حقيبة العار\". تسارع إش إش الوقت لإنقاذ رجب من الوقوع في قبضة معتصم.\r.
programme.title: إش إش موس

programme.desc: جدول البرامج غير متاح.
programme.title: جدول البرامج غير متاح

programme.desc: S2026 E86 يطل الإعلامي الكبير عمرو أديب على جمهوره، حيث يقدم في كل حلقة فقرات سياسية واجتماعية واقتصادية وفنية، ويقوم بتحليل الأحداث اليومية بأسلوب مبسط ومسلي.
programme.title: الحكاية مع عمرو أديب

programme.desc: S1 E1 كوم امبو.
programme.title: مسرح مصر الموس

programme.desc: جدول البرامج غير متاح.
programme.title: جدول البرامج غير متاح

programme.desc: S1 E7 اصيل هميم.
programme.title: غنيلي بالجو موس

programme.desc: جدول البرامج غير متاح.
programme.title: جدول البرامج غير متاح

programme.desc: S2026 E172 برنامج صباحي يتم تقديمه في إطار جذاب يهتم بكل ألوان الحياة في مصر حيث يعرض آخر الأخبار ويسلط الضوء على السلبيات الموجودة في المجتمع المصري للمساعدة في حلها.
programme.title: صباحك مصري

programme.desc: S1 E11 يحاول أنس التقرب من سلمى وفي الوقت ذاته يصر على الزواج من دهبية التي غيرت رأيها بخصوص الرجوع إلى رأفت. من ناحية ثانية، يتذرع أنس أمام نرجس بالشرطة ليبرر نقل ملكية البيت والحمام إلى اسمه.
programme.title: الحلال الموس

programme.desc: S1 E12 يقوم رجال ماجد باشا بتعذيب عز ليعترف بمكان النقود التي سرقها من آدم. من ناحية ثانية، تتزوج دهبية أخيراً من الحاج أنس ولكن سراً.
programme.title: الحلال الموس

programme.desc: S1 E13 يفاجئ أنس دهبية بالسفر إلى لبنان لقضاء شهر العسل في حين تعتقد نرجس بأنه ترك المنزل غاضباً بسبب شكها به. يتفق عز مع زيكو على إطلاق سراحه من أجل البحث عن رشاد.
programme.title: الحلال الموس

programme.desc: S1 E14 تستمر محاولات فاطيمة للوصول إلى قلب حسن، فيما تشعر سلمى بالانجذاب نحو باسم الذي أقنعها ببراءتها من جريمة مقتل زوجها وتسليم نفسها للشرطة.
programme.title: الحلال الموس

programme.desc: S1 E15 يرفض باسم الرجوع إلى بيت والدته بعد شجاره مع زوجها أنس. أما نرجس، فتواصل بحثها عن أنس. تكتشف الشرطة مكان سلمى وعز وقيام زيكو بخطف عز وعلاقة ماجد بذلك.
programme.title: الحلال الموس

programme.desc: جدول البرامج غير متاح.
programme.title: جدول البرامج غير متاح

programme.title: Battle Of Heer
programme.desc: A gentle-hearted woman is married into the formidable Atwal family, where she endures constant adversity until an unexpected ally gives her the courage to reshape her destiny. Tanisha Mehta, Avinesh Rekhi, Monica Khanna, Narinder Singh, Jaideep Singh, Archana Chawla, Amar Varpe, Akash Deep, Koel Chaudhuri.

programme.title: Mumbai's Bride
programme.desc: Neha struggles with being a single parent of a diabetic kid, but life provides her a second opportunity when a kind young man who would sacrifice anything for her shows up. Shreyas Talpade, Prarthana Behere.

programme.title: Everyone Feels Scared
programme.desc: In every episode, Bipasha Basu meets people haunted by ghosts, cursed objects, and unexplained phenomena, revealing the darkest side of the supernatural. Shweta Basu Prasad, Vikas Sethi.

programme.title: Ruzgar
programme.desc: The 10-year-old Ruzgar, a snatching gang member who unexpectedly enters Ece and Alper lives, will change everything. Belçim Bilgin, Sezai Paracikoglu, Ata Berk Mutlu, Cezmi Baskin, Nebil Sayin, Serkan Acar, Volkan Girgin, Belcim Bilgin.

programme.title: Race 3
programme.desc: When his father's criminal empire hinges on a powerful hard disk, Sikander Singh must recover it, facing betrayal from his own siblings and the ruthless machinations of his father. Anil Kapoor, Salman Khan, Bobby Deol, Jacqueline Fernandez, Daisy Shah, Remo DSouza, Shiraz Ahmed.

programme.title: Forensic
programme.desc: Two officers cooperate to use their forensic skills to uncover the identity of a brutal murderer who committed a series of crimes by targeting young girls. Tovino Thomas, Mamta Mohandas, Saiju Kurup, Reba Monica John, Renji Panicker, Anas Khan, Akhil Paul, P. Shijith.

programme.title: Ruzgar

Kartik Aaryan, Vijay Raaz, Bhuvan Arora, Yashpal Sharma, Kabir Khan, Kabir Khan, Sumit Arora.

programme.title: Zee Connect Bil Arabi
programme.desc: Covering the latest news from Arab and Bollywood stars, the show explores the hottest trends in fashion and beauty while delivering exclusive behind-the-scenes coverage of the newest film and television productions.

programme.title: Kakuda
programme.desc: Sunny from Rathodi, cursed by a vengeful spirit after a minor mishap, turns to a seasoned ghost hunter for help in breaking the ominous spell that threatens his life. Aditya Sarpotdar, Riteish Deshmukh, Sonakshi Sinha, Saqib Saleem, Aasif Khan, Garrvil Mohan, Avinash Dwivedi.

programme.title: Kaise Mujhe Tum Mil Gaye
programme.desc: Amruta believes in love and marriage, while Virat avoids relationships because of past heartbreak. As they spend time together, they must deal with their differences and the growing challenges in their relationship. Sriti Jha, Arjit Taneja.

programme.title: Lakhmi's Voyage
programme.desc: Lakshmi is a simple village girl, who finds herself facing many obstacles since her parents died, and the plan for her marriage changed. Now, she's going to Mumbai to meet her new destiny. Rohit Suchanti, Aishwarya Khare, Maera Mishra, Akankshaa Rajput, Vaibhav Mathur, Muzammil Desai, Khwaja Mughal, Dheeraj Sarna, Ekta Kapoor.
